hooks.command: root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; hook="$root/hooks/session-start.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then bash "$hook"; else printf '{}'; fi
root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; hook="$root/hooks/pre-edit-warn.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then bash "$hook"; else printf '{}'; fi
root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; hook="$root/hooks/post-bash-suggest.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then bash "$hook"; else printf '{}'; fi
root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; hook="$root/hooks/post-edit-suggest.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then bash "$hook"; else printf '{}'; fi
root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; hook="$root/hooks/mark-dirty.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then bash "$hook"; else printf '{}'; fi
root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; hook="$root/hooks/stop-suggest.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then bash "$hook"; else printf '{}'; fi
